analysis.problem: Inadequate affordable housing and potential loss of existing homes in cities
analysis.root_cause: Insufficient urban planning and lack of effective strategies to balance housing demand and supply
leverage_points: City governments and urban planning departments
Private real estate developers and investors

proposed_actions.action: Implement inclusive zoning policies and provide incentives for affordable housing development
proposed_actions.measurable_goal: Increase the number of affordable housing units by 20% within the next 2 years

proposed_actions.action: Invest in smart city technologies to improve urban planning and optimize resource allocation
proposed_actions.measurable_goal: Reduce housing costs by 10% and increase resident satisfaction by 15% within the next 3 years

evidence: We can’t build our way out of the housing crisis while losing homes every day
Chicago to buy, renovate Greyhound bus terminal to improve customer experience
analysis.generalization: This problem is connected to the domains of civilization, human dignity, and the health of the biosphere, as it affects the well-being and quality of life of urban residents
analysis.summary: Inadequate affordable housing and loss of existing homes in cities is a significant problem that requires effective urban planning and strategies to balance housing demand and supply. Implementing inclusive zoning policies and investing in smart city technologies can help address this issue.

raw_items.title: Chicago to buy, renovate Greyhound bus terminal
raw_items.summary: The city’s action, aimed at improving the customer experience for some 450,000 riders each year, saves the bus station from possible closure or demolition.

raw_items.title: As a Maryland city mulls upzoning, a Realtor association study touts its benefits
raw_items.summary: A “missing middle” housing proposal in Rockville, Maryland, would boost the city’s housing stock 4.5%, the local Realtor association said.

raw_items.title: Biking in US cities is getting better, 2026 report says
raw_items.summary: In PeopleForBikes’ annual rating, the number of cities with bike infrastructure that scored 50 or higher on a 100-point scale more than doubled this year.

raw_items.summary: The path forward is not just about adding supply. It is also about protecting it.

raw_items.title: Smart cities
raw_items.summary: A smart city is an urban model that leverages technology, human capital, and governance to improve sustainability, efficiency, and social inclusion, which are considered goals for cities of the future. raw_items.title: Urban planning
